# Chronicle — 시간해자 크로니클

> Append-only notarized ledgers of ephemeral Korean market data. Each change event is
> sealed in a SHA-256 hash chain, notarized by git commit history, and externally
> anchored via RFC 3161 timestamps — the ledger proves *when* something was observed.

Contract: one line of changes.jsonl = {observed_at, entity_id, field, before, after,
source_url, content_hash, chain_hash}. Record creation/deletion uses field=__record__.
Raw responses are preserved verbatim under snapshots/.

## Sources

### bunyang-capsule — 청약홈 APT 분양공고·주택형별 분양가 일간 박제
- events: 1166, records: 1166, last observed: 2026-07-10T02:33:03.504Z
- ledger (append-only): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/bunyang-capsule/changes.jsonl
- current state: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/bunyang-capsule/latest.json
- chain state: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/bunyang-capsule/integrity.json
- atom feed: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/bunyang-capsule/feed.xml

### forecast-graders — 기관 전망 박제 — 한은·KB·건산연·주산연
- events: 24, records: 6, last observed: 2026-07-10T08:02:23.025Z
- ledger (append-only): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/forecast-graders/changes.jsonl
- current state: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/forecast-graders/latest.json
- chain state: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/forecast-graders/integrity.json
- atom feed: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/main/data/forecast-graders/feed.xml

## Verify

Recompute the whole chain from genesis: `npm run verify -- --all` in the repo.
Spec: https://github.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/blob/main/PLAN.md · Contract: https://github.com/kwangdol-star/aiagentlabs/blob/main/README.md
